sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27026" key="diktuou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δικτῠοῦχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n27026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retiarius, Gloss.;</tr_> also <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δικτυοφόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
